attention1.ptxt: Do not suck nozzles on EVAP canister. Fuel vapor inside EVAP canister is harmful.

s1.ptxt: Check outside of EVAP canister visually.
Check that there is no restriction of flow through purge pipe (1) and air pipe (2) when air is blown (4) into tank pipe (3).
If faulty condition is found, replace EVAP canister.
Check EVAP canister for air leaks according to the following procedure.

s2.ptxt: Plug purge port (1) and air port (2) using rubber plug (3).
Install hose (4) and special tool to tank port (5).
Using special tool, apply specified vacuum pressure to EVAP canister for one minute.
If faulty condition is found, replace EVAP canister.
